text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good job, <chrname>! Wow, I'm so<n>proud of you!
☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I know! Now's the perfect time<n>for some
acupuncture!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try activating a few of<n>your
chakra points? Don't worry, I'll<n>be reeeal gentle.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be able to do a perfect<n>job in my
current state! You're in,<n>right? Then it's settled!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Just relaaax, and leave everything in<n>my capable
hands! ☆
